##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Light brown radiating acicular crystals, portion of the type material. Unit cell is triclinc, twinned around a-axis. The monoclinc cell of Hughes et al (2001) is obtained by doubling our b-axis, and transforming.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070165
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
